_comment: OpenClaw agent template. Use OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN for this agent’s gateway auth (separate from Rowboat’s ROWBOAT_GATEWAY_TOKEN). Also substitute SUPABASE_URL, NOTIFICATIONS_WEBHOOK_TOKEN, Telnyx keys (same names as vps/scripts/deploy-client.sh where shared).

compliance._comment: Real-estate/mortgage profile. fha_guardrails + the housing forbidden_topics below apply to FHA-covered tenants; other industries run with the neutral guardrail compiled into soul.md (see src/lib/compliance/fha.ts). Documentation only — the live per-tenant guardrail ships in the vault soul.md.

skills.description: Permanent DAG memory via Lossless Claw
Writes structured data back to webhook
